rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC performs strongly in trend regime
HYPE BUY is a net-negative setup: 23% WR on 35 live trades, -$77.26 total loss
SOL BUY is a net-negative setup: 24% WR on 34 live trades, -$21.89 total loss
Night session 00:00-06:00 UTC yields only 19% WR on 27 live trades, -$136.83 total loss
Illiquid regime yields only 28% WR on 57 trades with 71.9% noise-stop rate
HYPE SELL is net-negative EV: -$16.65 per trade on 239 live trades
BTC SELL at 70-79% confidence is the single largest loss bucket across all setups
rules.gate_reduction_reason: RUN85_AUTO_FIX (conf=82%>=75%): 100d shows BTC SHORT 70-79% at -$0.54/trade (neutral) vs 10d -$91.87 (cherry-picked bear regime). Halved penalty -20->-10. times_applied=3 times_correct=0 further supports reduction.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC SELL at 90%+ confidence is the #1 edge: 67% WR, +$102.92/trade EV on 43 trades. Strongly contradicts the general BTC_SHORT negative-EV pattern. This is the profit bin.
rules.gate_demotion_reason: DEMOTED Run82 2026-06-19T12:05:34Z: 10d evidence (67% WR, n=43) contradicted by 100d backtest (50% WR, -$3.48/trade, n=10). Rule has times_applied=0 — possibly broken condition match. Reducing gate=100%->20% (probe mode) pending live verification. Graduate back to 50% if WR>=60% n>=15; deactivate if WR<45% n>=15.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH in TRENDING regime = 71% WR, +$9.49/trade EV on 7 live trades. Strongest cross-regime edge after BTC_TRENDING (80% WR, n=5). Regime x symbol interaction: trending regime filters out noise trades.

HYPE in UNKNOWN regime achieves 83% WR, +$6.56/trade (n=6). Highest-WR setup found across all symbol×regime combinations. Possible regime-transition breakout signal. SIDE-AGNOSTIC probe — does not conflict with HYPE_LONG/HYPE_SHORT vetoes since this targets unknown regime only.

Signals with 60-70% confidence are net-negative: 46.3% WR on 123 trades, -$2321 total PnL. Worst performing confidence bin across all symbols and regimes. GATED (2026-05-17): adjustment reduced -20→-5 to break compounding deadlock with self_tuning CONSERVATIVE mode. Evidence conflict: insight_journal (67 trades) shows +$2.19/trade EV in this bin; rule built on older 123-trade window. -5pts preserves caution without total block. Gate: 20%.

BTC BUY in TRENDING regime = 18% WR on 17 live trades. Original BTC+trend boost (rule_1777922205_0) was 0/3 correct and deactivated. This counter-rule completes the triple protection stack: (1) this -13pt penalty gate=20%, (2) Critic prompt auto-challenges all BTC BUY by default, (3) parent boost rule deactivated. Graduate: escalate gate to 50% at n>=10 obs with WR<=0.45.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: GRADUATION_CRITERION_MET: pending_ab_graduation threshold was n>=10 WR<=0.45. Live data: 17 trades at 18% WR. Threshold met (17>=10, 0.18<=0.45). Feedback BTC_LONG_reduce at gate=50%. Triple protection stack (counter+Critic prompt+parent disabled). Conf=0.92 >> 0.75 threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Evening session 18:00-24:00 UTC yields 65% WR vs 10% night (spread 55%). n=27 live trades. Second-best TOD window after morning.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: insight INVALIDATED in insights.json — actual WR=33% not 65%. Built on invalidated data. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: Afternoon session 12:00-18:00 UTC yields 64% WR vs 31% night (spread 33%). n=27 live trades. Third-best TOD window.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: insight INVALIDATED in insights.json — actual WR=27% not 64%. Built on invalidated data. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: high_volatility regime = 55% WR vs 38% avg across all regimes. Best regime for trading by WR margin. Feedback engine: gate=80%, n=2172, conf=88%. LLM engine was missing this rule — sync gap detected 2026-05-22T01:06 UTC. Exempt from illiquid penalty stacking (different regime). Graduate: escalate gate 20%→50% at n>=25 obs with WR>=0.52.

Morning session 06:00-12:00 UTC = 74% WR on 7 insight_journal trades. BEST TOD window by WR (74% vs 65% evening, 64% afternoon, 19% night). Composite edge: ETH+BTC+trending+morning = confirmed alpha. Missing from LLM engine despite being tracked in feedback/graduated_rules.json (A/B_ACTIVE gate=50%) — write-consistency bug detected 2026-05-21T23:06 UTC. Graduate: escalate gate 50%→100% at n>=15 obs with WR>=0.65.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: n=7 insufficient evidence (below n=15 graduation threshold). insight_journal insight #6 directly contradicts with 14% WR for same session window. Two active insights give 74% vs 14% — conflicted data cannot support an active rule. Auto-fix conf=95% >= 75% threshold.

rules.hypothesis_statement: ETH SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 70% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
BTC BUY with bollinger_squeeze = 69% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN90_AUTO_FIX (conf=91%>=75%): btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 has evidence_ratio=0.69 (69% WR) on n=2172 shadow signals. Deep_memory confirms BTC_BUY_BB as Tier-1 golden setup. Graduation criterion met: WR=69%>=60% on n=2172>>15. Note: btc_long_veto_v1 at gate=80% limits pass-through, this rule provides targeted BB exception. Escalating gate 20%->50%.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL BUY with bollinger_squeeze = 67% WR (n=2172 shadow signals). Tier-1 golden setup.
rules.disabled_reason: Dead rule: sol_long_veto_v1 (gate=100%) always wins. SOL BUY WR=24%. Boost never fires. Disabled 2026-05-23.

rules.hypothesis_statement: HYPE SELL with bollinger_squeeze = 35% WR (n=2172). Worst BB setup. Block.
BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (n=2172). When both bollinger_squeeze AND multi_tier_quality fire, it's a contra-indicator. Penalize.
Ranging regime: 25% WR on 16 live trades (worse than illiquid 28.1%). Structurally losing regime.

80-85% confidence bin = 36.1% WR, -$52.16/trade avg on 100d backtest (n=36, 589 total trades). Worst performing confidence bin. Confidence anti-correlation confirmed by deep_memory (conf=0.93, n=2172): high confidence is NOT predictive above 80%.
rules.gate_escalation_reason: RUN84_AUTO_ESCALATION: Graduation criterion already met by 100d backtest data (WR=36.1%<45% n>=15). 80-85% bin: 36.1% WR on n=36. Full 80-90% bin: 40% WR on n=120. Conf=0.88 >> 0.75 threshold. Escalating 20%->50%.
rules.outcome_tracking: ESCALATED gate=20->50 by Run84. Graduate 50->80 if WR<45% n>=15 post-restart. Deactivate if WR>=55% n>=15.

rules.hypothesis_statement: SOL SELL = 34.6% WR on 52 live paper trades (suspension probe). Structurally weak short side.
rules.disabled_reason: DEACTIVATED Run81 2026-06-19T10:06:43Z: 179-trade 10d simulation shows SOL SHORT = 64% WR +$32.44/trade. Rule based on 52 stale paper trades is contradicted by 3.4x larger dataset. Re-evaluate if SOL SHORT live WR drops below 50% on n>=20 post-restart trades.

rules.hypothesis_statement: BTC LONG (BUY) is net-negative: 32% WR on 41 backtest trades (100d), avg -$13.42/trade, total -$550. Inverse confidence effect: 80%+ conf BTC LONGs = 19% WR. 10d shows 64% WR (n=72, conflict) — gate=80% preserves 20% pass-through for potential regime shift and BTC_BUY_BB_golden (69% WR) optionality.
rules.conflict_note: btc_buy_bb_golden_v1 (gate=20%) still active for BB-specific BTC LONGs. btc_trend_long_counter_v1 (gate=50%) covers trend regime. This rule adds general-purpose veto at 80% gate.
rules.graduate_criteria: Escalate to gate=100% if BTC_LONG WR<30% on n>=30 live trades post-restart. Deactivate if 10d BTC_LONG WR>=55% on n>=30 live trades.
